vocab.meaning: niềm tin kiên định vào ai đó
vocab.example: His unwavering belief in my potential gave me the confidence to pursue a degree in theoretical physics.

vocab.meaning: thu hút/làm say đắm người nghe (lớp học)
vocab.example: She had a unique ability to captivate the audience, making even the most mundane historical dates feel like a thrilling story.
Our biology teacher brought a wealth of experience from her years in field research, which made her lessons incredibly practical.

vocab.meaning: đưa ra những nhận xét có tính xây dựng
vocab.example: Instead of just pointing out errors, he would provide constructive feedback that actually helped us improve our writing skills.

vocab.meaning: khơi mào một cuộc tranh luận
vocab.example: He loved to spark a debate in class, encouraging us to think critically rather than just memorizing facts from a textbook.

vocab.meaning: hình thành thế giới quan của ai đó
vocab.example: The philosophy seminars I attended in high school truly helped to shape my worldview on ethics and social justice.

vocab.meaning: vượt xa khỏi trách nhiệm thông thường (tận tụy hơn mức cần thiết)
vocab.example: She went beyond the call of duty by organizing weekend workshops for students who were struggling with the curriculum.

vocab.meaning: tính cách sôi nổi, đầy năng lượng
vocab.example: Her vibrant personality made the classroom feel alive, and even the least interested students found themselves engaged.

vocab.meaning: xây dựng/nuôi dưỡng sự tôn trọng lẫn nhau
vocab.example: He managed to foster mutual respect between himself and the students, creating an atmosphere where everyone felt heard.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò/ham học hỏi về trí tuệ
vocab.example: My favorite teacher never gave us all the answers; instead, she aimed to cultivate our intellectual curiosity.
